batchPolicy.A: First local-first tracer products with a no-account, no-AI core slice
batchPolicy.B: Clear demand with additional data-model, import/export, or health-safety work
batchPolicy.C: Permission, deletion, privacy, entitlement, media, or model-cost risk requires extra proof

opportunities.name: Visual day planner with explainable replanning

pricingPain.signal: Motion lists $44.99 monthly or $294.99 annually; calendar integration and replanning are commonly premium
pricingPain.ourModel: Free local timeline and deterministic planning; optional one-time purchase for advanced templates and private sync

opportunities.wedge: Local Calendar and Reminders merge with deterministic scheduling, visible conflicts, and reversible proposals

firstSlice.workflow: Create three tasks, read today's calendar, build a conflict-free plan, drag one block, and preserve it after relaunch

optionalAI.proposal: Turn a brain dump into candidate tasks and time blocks with reasons
optionalAI.fallback: Deadline, duration, priority, and free-time packing rules

primaryRisk.mitigation: Read-only calendar integration in the first slice and explicit conflict previews

opportunities.name: Gentle focus and screen-use intervention

pricingPain.signal: Focus blockers commonly charge $20-$100 per year despite overlap with Screen Time and bypass limitations
pricingPain.ourModel: Free local timer and intention pause; one-time purchase for custom routines

opportunities.wedge: Honest protection status, low-pressure interruption, and local reflection without streak guilt

firstSlice.workflow: Select one app category, run a 25-minute session, show an intention pause, and save a local review

optionalAI.proposal: Summarize user-selected distraction patterns
optionalAI.fallback: Deterministic counts grouped by time and session

primaryRisk.mitigation: Do not promise an unbreakable block; continuously display permission and protection health

opportunities.name: Low-pressure habit and routine tracker

pricingPain.signal: Habit coaching apps combine aggressive paywalls, annual plans, and core limits
pricingPain.ourModel: Free unlimited local habits; optional one-time themes or private household sync

opportunities.wedge: Complete, shorten, skip, or move a routine without shame-based streak mechanics

firstSlice.workflow: Create morning and evening routines, complete or consciously skip them, and export a local weekly record

optionalAI.proposal: Suggest a two-minute version of an overloaded goal
optionalAI.fallback: User-defined minimum action and reminder rules

primaryRisk.mitigation: Neutral language, quiet defaults, and easy reminder suspension

opportunities.name: Offline adaptive focus and sleep soundscapes

pricingPain.signal: Endel lists annual purchases up to $119.99 and recurring upsell complaints
pricingPain.ourModel: Free offline base sounds; optional one-time licensed sound packs

opportunities.wedge: Procedural local audio, reusable mixes, and no streaming dependency or treatment claims

firstSlice.workflow: Choose Focus, mix three local sound layers, continue on the lock screen, and save the recipe

optionalAI.proposal: Suggest mix parameters from a selected activity, time, and heart-rate band
optionalAI.fallback: Deterministic presets and user-controlled mixer

primaryRisk.area: Audio licensing, battery, and health claims
primaryRisk.mitigation: Use owned procedural assets, profile background audio, and avoid therapeutic claims

opportunities.name: Local spaced-repetition study deck

pricingPain.signal: Quizlet charges about $44.99 yearly while low-rating feedback cites paywalled former features and ads
pricingPain.ourModel: Free unlimited local decks and review; charge only for optional collaboration or model credits

opportunities.wedge: Stable FSRS-style scheduling, source-linked cards, and open Markdown, CSV, and APKG-friendly exchange

firstSlice.workflow: Import a Chinese note, review five candidate cards, finish one session, and preserve tomorrow's due count

optionalAI.proposal: Generate reviewable cards and flag cards containing multiple facts
optionalAI.fallback: Manual card creation and deterministic spaced repetition

primaryRisk.mitigation: Mandatory candidate review and golden scheduling tests

opportunities.name: Offline student timetable and assignment loop

pricingPain.signal: Student planners frequently combine ads, subscriptions, and weak odd/even-week handling
pricingPain.ourModel: Free offline timetable, assignments, exams, reminders, and ICS/CSV export

opportunities.wedge: Semester templates plus explicit exception dates for alternating weeks and temporary changes

firstSlice.workflow: Create a two-week course cycle, apply one reschedule exception, and complete an assignment from course detail

optionalAI.proposal: Extract candidate courses from a screenshot or pasted schedule
optionalAI.fallback: Fast batch table entry

primaryRisk.mitigation: Semester-scoped exceptions, conflict preview, and no automatic overwrite

opportunities.name: Private journal and time capsule

pricingPain.signal: Day One lists $49.99-$74.99 yearly tiers and long-term users report subscription fatigue and workflow regression
pricingPain.ourModel: Free local text, photos, search, and export; optional one-time private sync upgrade

opportunities.wedge: Local journal package, open Markdown and media export, Face ID, and no training on entries

firstSlice.workflow: Write a photo entry, lock it, search by date, export a readable Markdown package, and import it again

optionalAI.proposal: Suggest titles, tags, weekly summaries, or reflection questions for selected entries
optionalAI.fallback: Manual tags, templates, search, and On This Day

primaryRisk.area: Private media loss and encryption recovery
primaryRisk.mitigation: Round-trip export tests, explicit backup health, and documented key recovery limits

opportunities.name: Private mood, energy, and symptom log

pricingPain.signal: Mood trackers often reserve custom factors, correlations, and reports for subscriptions
pricingPain.ourModel: Free local scales, factors, trends, CSV, and clinician-friendly PDF

opportunities.wedge: Ten-second structured capture and correlation language that never claims diagnosis or causation

firstSlice.workflow: Record mood, energy, sleep, and one factor for seven days, then create a one-page local report

optionalAI.proposal: Explain selected-period patterns as correlations with supporting observations
optionalAI.fallback: Deterministic trend and correlation statistics

primaryRisk.mitigation: Non-diagnostic language, local storage, and clear crisis-support boundaries

opportunities.name: Local text-to-speech reading workspace

pricingPain.signal: Speechify lists annual purchases around $139.99-$159.99 with complaints about limits, upsells, and sync delays
pricingPain.ourModel: Free unlimited system voices and local progress; explicit credits only for optional cloud voices

opportunities.wedge: System speech, offline documents, synchronized highlighting, bookmarks, and no server dependency for core reading

firstSlice.workflow: Import Chinese text, read it aloud, change speed, relaunch at the saved position, and export bookmarks

optionalAI.proposal: Explain, simplify, or summarize a selected passage
optionalAI.fallback: System speech, text search, bookmarks, and manual notes

primaryRisk.mitigation: Start with plain text, persist exact reading offsets, and test VoiceOver and background audio

opportunities.name: Local PDF reading, signing, and page workbench

pricingPain.signal: PDF Expert lists $49.99-$79.99 premium tiers while light-use customers object to recurring fees
pricingPain.ourModel: Free reading, annotations, signatures, and page organization; one-time advanced OCR and batch tools

opportunities.wedge: Private file operations, visible source preservation, and no cloud upload for ordinary PDF work

firstSlice.workflow: Open a PDF from Files, annotate and sign it, reorder two pages, and save a verified copy without changing the original

optionalAI.proposal: Summarize or answer questions about user-selected pages with citations
optionalAI.fallback: Full-text search, outline, annotations, and manual extraction

primaryRisk.mitigation: Copy-on-write transforms, original preservation, and explicit non-cryptographic signature labels

opportunities.name: Offline document, OCR, and receipt scanner

pricingPain.signal: Scanner apps commonly gate OCR, exports, watermarks, or page limits behind subscriptions
pricingPain.ourModel: Free unlimited local scan, OCR, searchable PDF, and export; one-time batch templates

opportunities.wedge: VisionKit capture, local OCR, structured receipt fields, and no document cloud

firstSlice.workflow: Scan a two-page receipt, crop it, make OCR searchable, and export a PDF plus one CSV row

optionalAI.proposal: Extract merchant, date, total, and category candidates
optionalAI.fallback: Vision OCR plus deterministic date and currency parsing

primaryRisk.mitigation: Keep source images, expose confidence, and require field confirmation

opportunities.name: Private voice notes and offline transcription

pricingPain.signal: Cloud transcription products charge recurring fees and minute limits while uploading sensitive recordings
pricingPain.ourModel: Free recording, markers, playback, and export; optional local model or transparent cloud minutes

opportunities.wedge: Original audio, timestamped transcript, and derived notes remain separate and user-owned

firstSlice.workflow: Record one minute of Chinese, add two markers, transcribe locally, jump from text to audio, and export Markdown

optionalAI.proposal: Draft topics and action items from a selected recording
optionalAI.fallback: Manual markers and system speech transcription where available

primaryRisk.area: Recording consent, model size, and transcription accuracy
primaryRisk.mitigation: Consent guidance, original-audio preservation, and editable transcripts

opportunities.name: No-account medication reminder and dose log

pricingPain.signal: Medication apps list annual subscriptions up to about $39.99 and some limit medicine or notification counts
pricingPain.ourModel: Safety-critical reminders, unlimited medicines, history, and export remain free

opportunities.wedge: Reliable local notifications, duplicate-dose protection, inventory, HealthKit option, and doctor-ready export

firstSlice.workflow: Add one twice-daily medicine, record take or later from a notification, prevent a duplicate, and export seven days

optionalAI.proposal: Extract reviewable medication fields from a box or prescription image
optionalAI.fallback: Manual structured entry and known schedules

primaryRisk.mitigation: Notification-health status, timezone tests, duplicate guards, and no dosage advice

opportunities.name: Honest sleep log and smart wake routine

pricingPain.signal: Sleep Cycle lists purchases up to about $57.99 and bundles coaching, sound detection, and content into subscriptions
pricingPain.ourModel: Free local sleep log, wake window, alarm, factors, and HealthKit trends

opportunities.wedge: Transparent trends without claiming that a phone microphone provides medical-grade sleep staging

firstSlice.workflow: Set a wake window, trigger the alarm, record sleep and caffeine, and show a seven-day trend

optionalAI.proposal: Suggest a reviewable sleep-hygiene experiment from recorded factors
optionalAI.fallback: Deterministic trend and factor comparison

primaryRisk.mitigation: Test system limitations, expose alarm health, and avoid diagnosis

opportunities.name: Explainable strength-training planner

pricingPain.signal: Fitbod lists annual purchases around $79.99-$95.99
pricingPain.ourModel: Free workout templates, logging, timers, progression rules, and HealthKit integration

opportunities.wedge: Visible progression rules and editable recommendations instead of an opaque AI trainer

firstSlice.workflow: Create a three-exercise plan, finish one workout, review the next-weight proposal, and preserve history

optionalAI.proposal: Draft the next session from equipment, history, and reported fatigue with explanations
optionalAI.fallback: Deterministic progressive-overload rules

primaryRisk.mitigation: Conservative defaults, editable plans, safety copy, and no medical claims

opportunities.name: Confidence-aware local plant care

pricingPain.signal: Planta lists annual purchases up to about $47.99 for identification and care features
pricingPain.ourModel: Free local plant records, reminders, journal, and holiday checklist; optional one-time content packs

opportunities.wedge: Editable schedules, visible identification confidence, and care history that remains useful without recognition

firstSlice.workflow: Add a plant photo, choose a candidate species, edit a watering schedule, and log one care event

optionalAI.proposal: Suggest candidate species and diagnostic questions with confidence
optionalAI.fallback: Manual species choice and user-authored care schedule

primaryRisk.mitigation: Show uncertainty, use regional context, and avoid automatic schedule replacement

opportunities.name: Offline envelope budget and spending review

pricingPain.signal: YNAB lists $109 yearly or $14.99 monthly even when users prefer manual entry
pricingPain.ourModel: Free complete manual budget and CSV import; bank aggregation is not a launch dependency

opportunities.wedge: Local envelope math, open export, explicit monthly rollover, and no bank login for the core workflow

firstSlice.workflow: Create three envelopes, import a CSV, review categories, record spending, and prove rollover conservation

optionalAI.proposal: Suggest transaction categories and anomaly candidates
optionalAI.fallback: Rules by merchant and deterministic balance calculations

primaryRisk.mitigation: Decimal-safe arithmetic, conservation invariants, and round-trip exports

opportunities.name: Local pantry, expiry, and grocery loop

pricingPain.signal: Kitchen products list annual plans around $44.99-$84.99 and cap free inventory or scans
pricingPain.ourModel: Free local inventory, expiry reminders, shopping list, and open export; optional one-time batch scanning

opportunities.wedge: Fast quantity changes, expiry visibility, optional barcode lookup, and no account for a useful kitchen

firstSlice.workflow: Add five pantry items, receive an expiry reminder, consume one item, add it to groceries, and export CSV

optionalAI.proposal: Extract reviewable items from a fridge photo or receipt
optionalAI.fallback: Manual quick add, barcode lookup, and quantity steppers

primaryRisk.mitigation: Treat dates as user data, avoid safety guarantees, and preserve edit history

opportunities.name: Offline recipe library and weekly menu

pricingPain.signal: New recipe importers list subscriptions around $39.99 yearly and often require sign-in
pricingPain.ourModel: Free manual recipes and weekly menu; one-time unlimited import and private sync

opportunities.wedge: User-owned recipes, source-preserving imports, serving conversion, and grocery list generation

firstSlice.workflow: Import one web recipe, edit it, schedule it for Wednesday, add missing ingredients, and export Markdown

optionalAI.proposal: Clean a web recipe or turn selected subtitles into candidate steps
optionalAI.fallback: Deterministic HTML metadata parsing and manual editing

primaryRisk.mitigation: Preserve source URLs, avoid republishing, and require review of ingredients and units

opportunities.name: Local natural-language calendar and menu-bar agenda

pricingPain.signal: Fantastical lists $56.99 individual and $89.99 family annual plans
pricingPain.ourModel: Free local parser, widgets, calendar sets, and templates; no hosted meeting service

opportunities.wedge: System calendar as source of truth with a structured preview and immediate undo before any write

firstSlice.workflow: Parse a Chinese event phrase, preview fields, write to a selected calendar, and undo from the menu bar

optionalAI.proposal: Resolve ambiguous date, person, and location candidates
optionalAI.fallback: Locale-aware deterministic parser

primaryRisk.area: Language ambiguity, timezone, and accidental invitations
primaryRisk.mitigation: Never invite in the first slice and require a structured preview

opportunities.name: Privacy-first clipboard history

pricingPain.signal: Paste lists $29.99 yearly or $89.99 lifetime for clipboard history and sync
pricingPain.ourModel: Free encrypted local text history and search; one-time media, transforms, and private sync

opportunities.wedge: Sensitive-app exclusion, expiry policies, visible pause state, and no whole-history AI exposure

firstSlice.workflow: Capture ten text clips, search and paste by keyboard, exclude a password manager, and expire clips after 24 hours

optionalAI.proposal: Transform or summarize only manually selected clips
optionalAI.fallback: Deterministic text transforms and templates

primaryRisk.mitigation: Default sensitive-app denylist, local encryption, short retention, and MCP off by default

opportunities.name: Local mail triage and reply drafting companion

pricingPain.signal: Spark lists individual and team AI plans from about $99 to $199 yearly and relies on cloud infrastructure
pricingPain.ourModel: Free local Apple Mail companion; optional metered drafting for selected messages

opportunities.wedge: Use system Mail for credentials and sending while locally tracking replies, deadlines, and drafts

firstSlice.workflow: Share one email, extract sender and deadline, add it to a reply list, edit a draft, and open Mail to send

optionalAI.proposal: Summarize and draft a response for one selected message with cited source lines
optionalAI.fallback: Rules, manual notes, templates, and system Mail compose

primaryRisk.mitigation: No mailbox-wide scan, no direct send, and explicit handoff to system Mail

opportunities.name: Local Markdown notes and lightweight knowledge base

pricingPain.signal: Bear charges $29.99 yearly for sync, encryption, complete export, and OCR while cloud tools require accounts
pricingPain.ourModel: Free local Markdown folders, tags, links, tasks, and Spotlight; optional one-time private sync tools

opportunities.wedge: Ordinary files remain the source of truth, with readable Git diffs and no proprietary database lock-in

firstSlice.workflow: Create three Markdown files, link them, rename one with link repair, and verify Finder and Git readability

optionalAI.proposal: Suggest links, titles, and summaries as a visible diff
optionalAI.fallback: Full-text search, tags, backlinks, and manual refactoring

primaryRisk.area: External edit conflicts and large-library performance
primaryRisk.mitigation: Atomic file writes, conflict copies, and indexed incremental updates

opportunities.name: Explainable and reversible Mac storage cleaner

pricingPain.signal: CleanMyMac lists yearly plans around $34.99-$65.99 and an $89.99 one-time option
pricingPain.ourModel: Free read-only storage map and explanations; one-time batch cleanup

opportunities.wedge: User-selected scope, deterministic categories, trash-first deletion, and a machine-readable restore manifest

firstSlice.workflow: Scan one selected folder, show the ten largest items, move a test file to Trash, and restore it from the manifest

optionalAI.proposal: Explain file categories and likely ownership in plain language
optionalAI.fallback: Path, signature, size, date, and metadata rules

primaryRisk.mitigation: Never bypass permissions, never permanently delete, and test restore before batch actions

opportunities.name: Private home inventory, warranty, and lending record

pricingPain.signal: Business inventory services are expensive and oversized for households
pricingPain.ourModel: Free complete single-household local core; optional one-time private family sync

opportunities.wedge: Photo-first rooms and boxes, receipts, warranties, lending, QR labels, and insurance-ready export

firstSlice.workflow: Add one room and five items, scan an item QR, mark it lent, and export CSV plus images

optionalAI.proposal: Extract candidate name, model, serial number, and warranty date from selected photos
optionalAI.fallback: Manual structured fields and barcode or QR labels

primaryRisk.mitigation: Local storage, field masking, encrypted export option, and no default cloud

opportunities.name: Explainable and reversible photo cleanup

pricingPain.signal: Photo cleaners frequently use weekly subscriptions and urgency-driven storage claims
pricingPain.ourModel: Free local exact-duplicate and review workflow; one-time advanced similarity tools

opportunities.wedge: Local clustering, explicit quality signals, per-group review, and the system Recently Deleted recovery window

firstSlice.workflow: Find exact duplicates and one similar group in a test album, review selections, and create an operation manifest

optionalAI.proposal: Explain sharpness, closed eyes, framing, and text-value signals for a selected group
optionalAI.fallback: Hashes, Vision features, and user-selected rules

primaryRisk.mitigation: No automatic best-shot deletion, system recovery window, and operation manifests
